title: Help Finds the Fallen Captain
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on help finds the fallen captain, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Help Finds the Fallen Captain. Luffy survives his first loss to Crocodile and begins the long road back into the fight for Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: So come as many times as you dare, sand- storm!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Yuba will never be defeated by mere sand!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!? This crab can't cross rivers!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: 4 Hours Remain...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Itinerant crabs are desert creatures,

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: So it's only natural they can't swim!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: B-But it's a crab for crying out loud! A freaking crab!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: It'll take forever if we try to swim across this huge river!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Not only that, we still have several tens of kilom- Eters to go even after crossing the river!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: If this crab can't cross the river, then that means... we'll have to go by foot!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: There's no way we'll make it in time then!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Oh crap! The river's already right in front of us!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Please do something, scissors! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: That's it! Scissors loves dancing girls!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: Will this do?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Ah, he's looking here.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Whoa, warp speed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 9C... a/wooohh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You accidentally broke 2 other animals here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sex appeal power!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...but how's this gonna help our situation at all, chopper!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh!? Holy moly... This crab is phenomenal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't believe it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ohhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's running on top of the water!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: -Or maybe not, AWW CRAP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

summary: This part develops help finds the fallen captain and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
